title: Create 1D
template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_1d(domain=({x_min}, {x_max}), n_inner_cells={n_cells})

mesh.write_to_hdf5("mesh.h5")
try:
    from zoomy_prepost import mesh_to_gmsh
    mesh_to_gmsh(mesh, "mesh.msh", boundary_group=None)
except Exception:
    pass  # .msh (dmplex/firedrake) — server has zoomy_prepost; local Pyodide skips

title: Create 2D
template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_2d(({x_min}, {x_max}, {y_min}, {y_max}), nx={nx}, ny={ny})

mesh.write_to_hdf5("mesh.h5")
try:
    from zoomy_prepost import mesh_to_gmsh
    mesh_to_gmsh(mesh, "mesh.msh", boundary_group=None)
except Exception:
    pass  # .msh (dmplex/firedrake) — server has zoomy_prepost; local Pyodide skips

title: Create 3D
template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_3d(({x_min}, {x_max}, {y_min}, {y_max}, {z_min}, {z_max}), nx={nx}, ny={ny}, nz={nz})

mesh.write_to_hdf5("mesh.h5")
try:
    from zoomy_prepost import mesh_to_gmsh
    mesh_to_gmsh(mesh, "mesh.msh", boundary_group=None)
except Exception:
    pass  # .msh (dmplex/firedrake) — server has zoomy_prepost; local Pyodide skips
